request_payload.exposure_text: As a former FEMA regional director, I've seen firsthand how critical civil defense preparedness is for national security. The current lack of investment in local emergency response capabilities is putting communities at risk. We can't afford to wait until the next disaster strikes—we need to act now to ensure our communities are resilient. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense #Preparedness
